site.name: Holler & Hymn
site.tagline: Saturday night sin. Sunday morning hymn. Both in one bottle.
site.intent: Single-maker Appalachian botanical-liqueur house. Wolfpen Holler, Madison County, NC. Wendell Greene.

logo.synthesizedBasis: BRAND.md logo direction — round seal OR stacked wordmark OR apothecary panel; ampersand-centered; hand-lettered revival-tent typography on Sunday-bulletin cream; rust-red on cream OR cream on hymnal-black
logo.pendingExternalGen: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview — see BRAND.md logo prompt seed

anchorPhrases: Saturday night sin. Sunday morning hymn. Both in one bottle.
Made by hand. From a to z.
Twenty-seven herbs, eleven labels, one preacher's shed.
voice.tensionMove: the holler × the hymn — Saturday-night outlaw + Sunday-morning revival, both at full volume, the ampersand is the brand

imageryLanes.description: photographic-realistic, golden-hour WNC mountain holler, copper still, foraging hands, mason jars, weathered tin roof
still-life photographs, worn leather hymnal, Sunday bulletin typography, brass-edged pages, folding chair, wooden pew
hand-painted bottle labels with dripping ink, mid-century jukebox typography, matchbook art, tent-revival flyers, vintage country-music sleeves
